chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-584 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No.2378/2026. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on MA No.2379/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 02.04.2026 Raja Hans Raj Naurang advocate for petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. The petitioner seeks a writ against a notice dated 17.03.2026 passed by the Pakistan Railways, Kotri, for vacating Railway Quarter No.155/A, Railway Colony Kotri. The petitioner claims to be the sister of late Nadir Ali Rind, who was a railway employee, and who passed away during service on 18.02.2020. Learned counsel is not able to satisfy the court how the petitioner can claim any right in a quarter allotted to her brother. Nevertheless, from the impugned notice, it transpires that the railway employee to whom the quarter was allotted had passed away six years ago; his retention period expired on 30.03.2026; where after the quarter was allotted to another railway employee; however, the petitioner seeks to perpetuate her possession of the same. Since counsel has not been able to demonstrate any right of the petitioner to continue to be in occupation of the railway quarter, the petition is without merit. This petition is, therefore, dismissed in limini. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
